title: Epitaph Extempore
content:
Nobles and Heralds, by your leave,
Here lies what once was Matthew Prior,
The son of Adam and of Eve;
Can Stuart or Nassau claim higher.
meaning:
Matthew Prior's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epitaph Extempore"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
